texto: When I was younger, the idea of the bad boy was appealing, but then I grew up and realized that stable people are more fulfilling. Bad boys need more time to themselves. I want to be in a relationship with someone who knows how to take care of himself and is therefore able to take care of me. That way, we can put each other first.

I want to be in a relationship with someone who knows how to take care of himself and is therefore able to take care of me. That way, we can put each other first.

texto: I like when a man has a positive self-image, no matter what he looks like. I'm not into rock-hard abs.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jessica Parker Kennedy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “I like when a man has a positive self-image, no matter what he looks like. I'm not into rock-hard…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, man, matter pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de matter e looks.
